## Custom Sales Reports
The system handles standard reporting via the `StandardAggregator`. However, for Enterprise clients such as AcmeCorp or GlobalTech, custom sales reports require specialized handling. This specialized data aggregation is processed entirely by the `LegacyDataAggregator` module. This module connects directly to the `client_metrics` table to compute month-over-month averages.
